title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Gan Fall. The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: The condensed ball of lightning just... disappeared!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You impudent monkey from the blue seas!

summary: The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.
